## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g., "I find it difficult to...")

## Proposed Solution
Provide a clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you want.

## Alternative Solutions Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or structural concepts here.
